message:
test(connectors): batch 1 — upgrade 5 presence-only asserts to pin content/shape [7k7pl]

First batch of the tests/ presence-only assertion sweep from meta-bead
coding_agent_session_search-7k7pl. 5 upgrades across 5 connector test
files, each pinning content/shape rather than mere `.is_some()` /
`!is_empty()`:

1. tests/connector_gemini.rs::gemini_parses_timestamps
   - `c.started_at.is_some()` + `c.ended_at.is_some()` +
     `c.messages[0].created_at.is_some()` → unwrap-via-`.expect()`,
     assert `started <= ended`, assert first-message created_at
     falls within [started, ended]. Catches swapped / epoch-0 /
     clock-now fallback regressions.

2. tests/connector_claude.rs::claude_parses_project_fixture
   - Collapse `.is_some() + .unwrap() <` into `.expect()`-based
     contract with per-message window containment: every
     message's created_at must fall inside [started, ended]. Same
     regression class as gemini above.

3. tests/connector_copilot_cli.rs timestamp block
   - Same pattern: `.expect()` + window containment across all 4
     fixture messages. Named diagnostic per message index.

4. tests/connector_amp.rs::amp_scan_returns_conversations
   - `external_id.is_some()` → `.as_deref().expect(...)` + assert
     non-empty + length >= 8 (UUID-like). Catches
     `Some(String::new())` / `Some("null")` regressions that would
     silently break downstream dedup keyed on external_id.

5. tests/connector_opencode.rs partial-session fallback test
   - `title.is_some()` → assert the title CONTAINS a prefix of the
     first message content. The test's name literally describes
     "title falls back to first message content" but the old
     assertion accepted any `Some(_)`. A regression that fell back
     to a placeholder like `(untitled)` would slip past.

Each upgrade carries an inline `Bead 7k7pl` comment naming the
regression class the stronger assertion catches.

Validation: `cargo test --test connector_gemini`,
`cargo test --test connector_claude`, `cargo test --test
connector_copilot_cli`, `cargo test --test connector_amp`, and
`cargo test --test connector_opencode` all pass locally via
CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_cass_pane3.

Next batches of the sweep (per 7k7pl's plan): storage*.rs,
search_asset_harness.rs, pages_wizard.rs, secret_scan.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
